text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇧🇬 🗳️ Bulgaria is holding parliamentary elections today, with the main frontrunner being a pro-Russian former president often compared to Viktor Orbán. 🔹 This marks the 8th election in the past five years, highlighting the country’s near “chronic” political instability during this period. 🔹 According to polls, around 35% of voters plan to support the “Progressive Bulgaria” party led by former president Rumen Radev. There are concerns that, if he prevails, Bulgaria could shift closer to Moscow’s influence within the EU. 🔹 Radev served as president from 2017 to 2026 but stepped down early in January to participate in the elections, as the prime minister holds greater executive power than the president in Bulgaria. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇧🇬 🗳️ 保加利亚今天举行议会选举，主要领跑者是一位常被拿来与维克托·欧尔班相提并论的亲俄前总统。 🔹 这是过去五年来的第八次选举，凸显了该国在此期间近乎“慢性”的政治不稳定。 🔹 根据民调，约35%的选民计划支持由前总统鲁门·拉德夫领导的“进步保加利亚”党。人们担心，如果他获胜，保加利亚在欧盟内部可能会更倾向于莫斯科的影响力。 🔹 拉德夫曾于2017年至2026年担任总统，但于1月提前卸任以参加选举，因为在保加利亚，总理拥有的行政权力比总统更大。与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner 🇺🇸 The Boeing Company has once again presentedan updated concept for the development of the legendary CH-47 Chinook helicopter, which they plan to transform into a platform for launching various unmanned vehicles. According to the company, its plans include offering customers a wide range of unmanned solutions, including reconnaissance drones, kamikazes, decoy targets, and jamming devices, which will be ejected directly through the rear ramp of the cargo compartment. At the same time, the enormous payload capacity of the "Chinook" allows it to carry dozens of such devices, including heavy versions weighing up to 100 kg with a flight range of more than 600 kilometers. Potentially, at the customer's request, this transforms the transport helicopter into a full-fledged carrier of high-precision weapons, capable of saturating the battlefield with autonomous systems without entering the enemy's air defense zone. In parallel with the expansion of its arsenal, Boeing is working on creating an optionally manned version of the helicopter, which will be able to fly with a reduced crew or completely autonomously. The foundation for this is the already existing APAS (Active Parallel Actuator Subsystem) system, which operates on the principle of car lane control: it takes over routine control and stabilization, allowing pilots to focus on the tactical situation. Thus, in February 2026, the CH-47F successfully performed its first fully automatic landing without human intervention. tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Visioner 🇺🇸 波音公司再次展示了其传奇机型CH-47“支奴干”直升机的升级开发概念，他们计划将其转变为发射各种无人驾驶飞行器的平台。据该公司称，其计划包括为客户提供广泛的无人解决方案，包括侦察无人机、自杀式无人机、诱饵目标和干扰设备，这些设备将直接通过货舱后舱门弹出。同时，“支奴干”巨大的有效载荷能力使其能够携带数十种此类设备，包括重达100公斤、航程超过600公里的重型版本。潜在地，应客户要求，这将使该运输直升机转变为成熟的高精度武器载体，能够在不进入敌方防空区的情况下用自主系统覆盖战场。在扩大武器库的同时，波音公司正在致力于制造该直升机的可选有人驾驶版本，该版本将能够以精简机组人员或完全自主的方式飞行。其基础是现有的APAS（主动并行执行器子系统），该系统的工作原理类似于汽车车道保持控制：它接管日常控制和稳定，使飞行员能够专注于战术情况。因此，2026年2月，CH-47F成功完成了首次无需人工干预的全自动着陆。推文

text: Visioner 🇦🇷 🇮🇷 Speaking to Israeli Channel 14, Argentine President Javier Milei delivers a blunt message on the "cowardice" of the international community on the Iranian Threat: "If you want peace, you have to be prepared for war. The person who is afraid dies every day. On the other hand, the one who faces life with courage will die only once." ➡️ Milei warns that the international community is too "afraid to confront" the Iranian threat. He argues that failing to stand up to those who seek our destruction is a path to certain defeat. 📝 Should be noted that Iran and its terrorist proxies conducted in 1994 the biggest Terror attack in All South America in Argentina, the AMIA bombings, which killed 85 people and injured more than 300 tweet

And any government that violates international law, and therefore violates the principles and values of the European Union, cannot be a partner of the European Union. tweet

text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普：我们提供了一项非常公平合理的协议，我希望他们会同意，因为如果不这样，美国将摧毁伊朗的每一座发电厂和每一座桥梁。不再做老好人了！他们会很快倒下，很容易倒下，如果他们不达成协议，我很荣幸能做需要做的事情，即过去47年来其他总统对伊朗需要做的事情。是时候结束伊朗的杀人机器了！推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Open Source Intel Trump: Iran decided to fire bullets yesterday in the Strait of Hormuz — A Total Violation of our Ceasefire Agreement! Many of them were aimed at a French Ship, and a Freighter from the United Kingdom. That wasn't nice, was it? My Representatives are going to Islamabad, Pakistan — They will be there tomorrow evening, for Negotiations. Iran recently announced that they were closing the Strait, which is strange, because our BLOCKADE has already closed it. They're helping us without knowing, and they are the ones that lose with the closed passage, $500 Million Dollars a day! The United States loses nothing. In fact, many Ships are headed, right now, to the U.S., Texas, Louisiana, and Alaska, to load up, compliments of the IRGC, always wanting to be “the tough guy!” We're offering a very fair and reasonable DEAL, and I hope they take it because, if they don't, the United States is going to knock out every single Power Plant, and every single Bridge, in Iran. NO MORE MR. NICE GUY! They'll come down fast, they'll come down easy and, if they don't take the DEAL, it will be my Honor to do what has to be done, which should have been done to Iran, by other Presidents, for the last 47 years. IT'S TIME FOR THE IRAN KILLING MACHINE TO END! President DONALD J. TRUMP tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Open Source Intel 特朗普：伊朗昨天决定在霍尔木兹海峡开火——这完全违反了我们的停火协议！其中许多子弹瞄准了一艘法国船只和一艘来自英国的货船。那可不友好，不是吗？我的代表们将前往巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡——他们明天晚上会到达那里进行谈判。伊朗最近宣布他们正在关闭海峡，这很奇怪，因为我们的封锁已经关闭了它。他们不知不觉地在帮助我们，而他们才是因通道关闭而损失的一方，每天损失5亿美元！美国什么也没损失。事实上，许多船只现在正前往美国、德克萨斯州、路易斯安那州和阿拉斯加州装载货物，这要归功于伊斯兰革命卫队，他们总是想当“硬汉”！我们提供了一项非常公平合理的协议，我希望他们接受，因为如果不接受，美国将摧毁伊朗的每一座发电厂和每一座桥梁。不再做老好人了！他们会很快倒下，很容易倒下，如果他们不接受协议，我很荣幸能做需要做的事情，即过去47年来其他总统对伊朗需要做的事情。是时候结束伊朗的杀人机器了！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统 推文

NO MORE MR. NICE GUY!" https://twitter.com/Faytuks/status/2045839137127780364/photo/1 - Faytuks News tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 威特科夫等人正前往伊斯兰堡进行会谈。万斯不会去。特朗普还表示，伊朗通过向航运开火和关闭霍尔木兹海峡违反了停火协议。特朗普表示，如果伊朗不同意他们的协议，美国将：“摧毁伊朗的每一座发电厂和每一座桥梁。不再做老好人了！” https://twitter.com/Faytuks/status/2045839137127780364/photo/1 - Faytuks News 推文

text: Open Source Intel No new date set for the next round of U.S.-Iran talks, but Pakistan is preparing to host, according to al-Mayadeen's Islamabad correspondent. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 据半岛电视台伊斯兰堡记者称，下一轮美伊会谈尚未确定新日期，但巴基斯坦正准备主办。推文

text: OSINTtechnical Trump, in an early morning post, says that after violating the ceasefire, if Iran does not take the US-offered peace deal, "the United States is going to knock out every single Power Plant, and every single Bridge" in Iran. Adds "NO MORE MR. NICE GUY!" https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2045839473301238057/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 特朗普在清晨的一篇帖子中表示，在违反停火协议后，如果伊朗不接受美国提供的和平协议，“美国将摧毁伊朗的每一座发电厂和每一座桥梁”。并补充说“不再做老好人了！” https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2045839473301238057/photo/1 推文

text: 🇦🇷 🇮🇱 ⚡️ Argentina President Milei will meet with Bibi today to discuss Israeli artificial intelligence. He breaks down in tears while kissing the Western Wall in Jerusalem. He will also be awarded the Israeli President’s Medal of Honour… officially for being part of that VERY EXCLUSIVE, EXTREMELY NORMAL “special club” 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇦🇷 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 阿根廷总统米莱今天将与比比会面，讨论以色列的人工智能。他在耶路撒冷亲吻西墙时流下了眼泪。他还将被授予以色列总统荣誉勋章……正式原因是作为那个非常独特、极其正常的“特殊俱乐部”的一员 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: Trump said Iran war negotiations will resume this week as Steve Witkoff travels to Pakistan, with Jared Kushner also joining talks. “Steve’s going to be going there tomorrow night,” Trump said, adding the next round is set for Tuesday in Islamabad. JD Vance, who led earlier talks, will not attend. Source: New York Post
text_zh: 特朗普表示，随着史蒂夫·威特科夫前往巴基斯坦，贾里德·库什纳也将加入会谈，伊朗战争谈判将于本周恢复。特朗普说：“史蒂夫明天晚上要去那里”，并补充说下一轮谈判定于周二在伊斯兰堡举行。此前领导早期会谈的JD·万斯将不会出席。来源：纽约邮报

text: Trump to Fox News: If Iran does not sign this deal, the whole country is getting blown up.
text_zh: 特朗普对福克斯新闻表示：如果伊朗不签署这项协议，整个国家都将被炸毁。

text: Judges approved Netanyahu’s request to cancel his testimony scheduled for tomorrow, citing “security and political constraints.”
text_zh: 法官批准了内塔尼亚胡取消原定于明天作证的请求，理由是“安全和政治限制”。

text: Spanish PM Pedro Sánchez: On Tuesday, the Spanish Government will bring to Europe the proposal that the European Union should break its association agreement with Israel. And we are going to do it—not because we have anything against Israel; on the contrary, we are a people who are friends of the Israeli people—but we do not agree with the actions being carried out by its government. And any government that violates international law, and therefore violates the principles and values of the European Union, cannot be a partner of the European Union.
text_zh: 西班牙首相佩德罗·桑切斯：周二，西班牙政府将向欧洲提出建议，即欧盟应终止与以色列的联系国协定。我们这样做并不是因为我们对以色列有什么成见；恰恰相反，我们是与以色列人民友好的民族，但我们不同意其政府所采取的行动。任何违反国际法，从而违反欧盟原则和价值观的政府，都不能成为欧盟的伙伴。

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Trump reacts to Iran’s closure of the Strait of Hormuz: Iran decided to fire bullets yesterday in the Strait of Hormuz - A Total Violation of our Ceasefire Agreement! Many of them were aimed at a French Ship, and a Freighter from the United Kingdom. That wasn't nice, was it? Iran recently announced that they were closing the Strait, which is strange, because our BLOCKADE has already closed it. We’re offering a very fair and reasonable DEAL, and I hope they take it because, if they don’t, the United States is going to knock out every single Power Plant, and every single Bridge, in Iran.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 特朗普对伊朗关闭霍尔木兹海峡做出反应：伊朗昨天决定在霍尔木兹海峡开火——这完全违反了我们的停火协议！其中许多子弹瞄准了一艘法国船只和一艘来自英国的货船。这可不友好，不是吗？伊朗最近宣布他们要关闭海峡，这很奇怪，因为我们的封锁已经将其关闭了。我们提供了一项非常公平合理的协议，我希望他们接受，因为如果他们不接受，美国将摧毁伊朗境内的每一座发电厂和每一座桥梁。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Two more oil tankers were forced to turn back in the Strait of Hormuz 🔹 Following the continued naval blockade by Iran, Iranian armed forces today turned back two additional oil tankers from passing through the Strait of Hormuz. 🔹 The two tankers, sailing under the flags of Botswana and Angola, intended to transit through this strategic waterway but were forced to change course and retreat due to the timely action of the armed forces of the Islamic Republic of Iran. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 两艘油轮在霍尔木兹海峡被迫折返 🔹 在伊朗持续的海上封锁之后，伊朗武装部队今天迫使另外两艘油轮无法通过霍尔木兹海峡。 🔹 这两艘悬挂博茨瓦纳和安哥拉国旗的油轮原计划通过这条战略水道，但由于伊朗伊斯兰共和国武装部队的及时行动，被迫改变航向并撤退。 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇺🇸 Trump woke up and posted that his representatives are going to Islamabad 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 特朗普醒来后发帖称，他的代表们正前往伊斯兰堡 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: BREAKING: Trump: Iran decided to fire bullets yesterday in the Strait of Hormuz — A Total Violation of our Ceasefire Agreement! Many were aimed at a French Ship and a Freighter from the United Kingdom. My Representatives are going to Islamabad, Pakistan — They will be there tomorrow evening for Negotiations. Iran announced they were closing the Strait, but our BLOCKADE has already closed it. They lose $500 Million Dollars a day, the United States loses nothing. We’re offering a fair DEAL — if they don’t take it, the United States is going to knock out every Power Plant and every Bridge in Iran. NO MORE MR. NICE GUY! IT’S TIME FOR THE IRAN KILLING MACHINE TO END!
text_zh: 突发：特朗普：伊朗昨天决定在霍尔木兹海峡开火——这完全违反了我们的停火协议！许多子弹瞄准了一艘法国船只和一艘来自英国的货船。我的代表们正前往巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡——他们将于明晚抵达那里进行谈判。伊朗宣布他们要关闭海峡，但我们的封锁已经将其关闭了。他们每天损失5亿美元，美国什么也没损失。我们提供了一项公平的协议——如果他们不接受，美国将摧毁伊朗境内的每一座发电厂和每一座桥梁。不再做老好人了！是时候终结伊朗的杀戮机器了！

text: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesperson on the US blockade. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗外交部发言人就美国封锁发表评论。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ELINT News RT @BarakRavid : 🚨 🚨 Trump on Truth Social: Iran decided to fire bullets yesterday in the Strait of Hormuz — A Total Violation of our Ceasefire Agreement! Many of them were aimed at a French Ship, and a Freighter from the United Kingdom. That wasn’t nice, was it? My Representatives are going to Islamabad, Pakistan — They will be there tomorrow evening, for Negotiations. Iran recently announced that they were closing the Strait, which is strange, because our BLOCKADE has already closed it. They’re helping us without knowing, and they are the ones that lose with the closed passage, $500 Million Dollars a day! The United States loses nothing. In fact, many Ships are headed, right now, to the U.S., Texas, Louisiana, and Alaska, to load up, compliments of the IRGC, always wanting to be “the tough guy!” We’re offering a very fair and reasonable DEAL, and I hope they take it because, if they don’t, the United States is going to knock out every single Power Plant, and every single Bridge, in Iran. NO MORE MR. NICE GUY! They’ll come down fast, they’ll come down easy and, if they don’t take the DEAL, it will be my Honor to do what has to be done, which should have been done to Iran, by other Presidents, for the last 47 years. IT’S TIME FOR THE IRAN KILLING MACHINE TO END! tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转推 @BarakRavid : 🚨 🚨 特朗普在“真实社交”（Truth Social）上表示：伊朗昨天决定在霍尔木兹海峡开火——这完全违反了我们的停火协议！其中许多子弹瞄准了一艘法国船只和一艘来自英国的货船。这可不友好，不是吗？我的代表们正前往巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡——他们将于明晚抵达那里进行谈判。伊朗最近宣布他们要关闭海峡，这很奇怪，因为我们的封锁已经将其关闭了。他们是在不知情的情况下帮助了我们，而且他们才是因通道关闭而蒙受损失的一方，每天损失5亿美元！美国什么也没损失。事实上，许多船只现在正前往美国、德克萨斯州、路易斯安那州和阿拉斯加州进行装载，这多亏了伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC），他们总是想当“硬汉”！我们提供了一项非常公平合理的协议，我希望他们接受，因为如果他们不接受，美国将摧毁伊朗境内的每一座发电厂和每一座桥梁。不再做老好人了！它们会迅速倒塌，轻而易举地倒塌，如果他们不接受协议，我将很荣幸地去做必须做的事情，而这本应在过去47年里由其他总统对伊朗完成。是时候终结伊朗的杀戮机器了！推文
